subject: A regal sphinx with a serene human-like face, large feathered wings spread wide, and an ornate golden headdress. The creature hovers or perches in a temple-like setting with a sweeping cloak or robe.
description: A majestic sphinx dominates the frame, wings spread in a heraldic flying pose. Its face is calm, regal, and impassive, framed by an ornate golden headdress reminiscent of an Egyptian nemes or pharaonic crown. Long, pale hair or fabric streams behind the head. The torso is wrapped in flowing teal-and-gold robes or feathered drapery, and the chest bears a glowing golden emblem. The wings are immense and detailed, fanning across the entire upper portion of the art in pale silver-blue tones. The background suggests a vast, classical interior — pale stone columns and a high arched space — bathed in soft golden light, evoking a temple or judicial hall.
foreground: sphinx with spread wings, golden headdress, glowing chest emblem, teal and gold robes
background: pale stone columned hall with soft golden ambient light
